signal: Both buyer and developer gates fail at the bounded-opt sizing with 5%-below-EVN strike. Buyer pays MORE than EVN (-2.93B VND savings = net increase). Developer min DSCR = -0.175 (negative). Recommend revising strike anchor or escalating with actual project 8760 data.

controller_gap.note: Optimizer dispatches BESS to zero net discharge in bounded-opt case; all PV energy goes to residual EVN imports. Controller proxy with fixed windows shows 1,430 kWh matched vs 0 for optimizer (at bounded-opt sizing).

sensitivities_needed.note: Developer gate fails at 5% below EVN. Recommended minimum strike to clear developer DSCR ≥ 1.0: approximately 3900+ VND/kWh (vs current 2334 VND/kWh).
sensitivities_needed.storage_duration: Explore 4hr vs 2hr BESS duration to improve matched renewable quantity
sensitivities_needed.pv_size: Explore 3.2 MWp (real-project base) vs 4.8 MWp (bounded-opt) — smaller PV may reduce excess generation

escalation_path.rationale: saigon18 load shape is a static industrial proxy; real project may have different hourly profile. Actual 8760 load data would allow more accurate shortfall/matched quantity estimate.
